channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: AI summit in Paris brings together Big Tech and U.S. VP Vance
item.description: Major world leaders are meeting for an AI summit in Paris, where challenging diplomatic talks are expected as tech titans fight for dominance in the fast-moving technology industry.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: NetOps teams ready to dump incumbent monitoring tools
item.description: Replacing a network management tool is not a trivial exercise, especially in large and complex networks. It can take months to install and tune a tool so that it is delivering value.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Find the perfect free Zoom background at these 3 sites
item.description: Maybe I should begin this article by arguing that nothing spices up a mundane meeting like a creative, beautiful, or hilarious background for your Zoom calls. But the reality is that most of us just need to hide messy offices, guestroom beds, or dirty-dish-filled kitchens.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: Marvel debuts new Thunderbolts* trailer during Super Bowl LIX, and it reveals the MCU movie's main villain who you probably expected to be a good guy
item.description: The official trailer for Marvel's Thunderbolts* movie teases plenty of action, jokes, and its main villain.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Home Depot's Presidents' Day sale is live – up to 50% off appliances, furniture and tools
item.description: The 2025 Home Depot Presidents' Day sale is live, and I'm rounding up all the best deals on appliances, tools, furniture, and more.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Beleaguered Cal State University’s $17 million artificial intelligence initiative defended, attacked
item.description: The California State University system, facing an estimated budget shortfall of $428 million to $1 billion next year because of state-level cuts and deferments, this week announced a partnership with major technology companies including OpenAI, Google and Microsoft to bring their artificial intellig
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: PSN is down – gamers left without their online fix as PlayStation Network outage is still ongoing after 12 hours
item.description: We’re seeing red lights across Sony’s service status dashboard, and it’s not looking too good for weekend gaming prospects right now.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: JDK 24: The new features in Java 24
item.description: Java Development Kit (JDK) 24 has entered the release candidate stage. The next version of standard Java will ship with 24 features, ranging from a class-file API to a fourth preview of structured concurrency. The first JDK 24 release candidate arrived February 6, following two rampdown stages.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How the slash-and-burn tactics Musk brought to Washington backfired at Twitter
item.description: When Elon Musk bought Twitter in 2022, he laid off thousands of employees, stopped paying rent and auctioned off coffee makers and office chairs in hopes of a big turnaround.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Transportation Department suspends $5 billion EV charger program
item.description: The Federal Highway Administration (FHWA) on Thursday announced the suspension of a Biden-era electric vehicle (EV) charging network, the latest in a series of moves by the Trump administration to gut its predecessors’ energy and environmental moves.
item.dc:creator: Zack Budryk, The Hill

item.title: Windows PowerToys: Your handy productivity toolbox
item.description: Back in the 1990s, Windows power users often availed themselves of a set of small, free software tools from Microsoft collectively known as “PowerToys.” (Read about their history at Wikipedia.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Honeywell transforms with gen AI
item.description: Having spent years transforming into a fully data-driven enterprise, American conglomerate Honeywell is now poised to leverage gen AI across every facet of its business to drive improved productivity, collaboration, and innovation.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The number of venomous snakes removed from this Australian yard will make you shudder
item.description: A man described feeling “the shudders” as more than 100 venomous red-bellied black snakes were removed from a pile of mulch in his Sydney backyard.
item.dc:creator: Rod Mcguirk, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: New law in Brazil is making students put away their smartphones at school
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazilian students returned to class this week with a new task: staying away from their smartphones as a new law restricting their use in schools took effect.
item.dc:creator: GABRIELA SÁ PESSOA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: GitHub Copilot previews agent mode
item.description: GitHub has added new capabilities to its GitHub Copilot AI-powered coding assistant, including a preview of a new agent mode capable of iterating on its own code. The company also announced the general availability of Copilot Edits in Visual Studio Code.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI looks across US for sites to build its Trump-backed Stargate AI data centers
item.description: OpenAI is scouring the U.S. for sites to build a network of huge data centers to power its artificial intelligence technology, expanding beyond a flagship Texas location and looking across 16 states to accelerate the Stargate project championed by President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Nebraska government system shutdown disrupts the Legislature, DMV and other offices
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — A systemwide outage of state goverment computers shut down everything from the work of the Legislature to driver’s licensing offices for several hours Thursday.
item.dc:creator: MARGERY A. BECK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: One Tech Tip: How to block your phone from tracking your location
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Smartphones are useful tools for everyday life, but they're privy to nearly everything about you, including all the places you've been — if you let them.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Judge says Elon Musk's claims of harm from OpenAI are a 'stretch' but welcomes possible trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Elon Musk's lawyers faced off with OpenAI in court Tuesday as a federal judge weighed the billionaire's request for a court order that would block the ChatGPT maker from converting itself to a for-profit company. U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Google's rising holiday's season ad sales aren't enough to ease worries about AI letdown
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google's digital ad sales continued to grow at a healthy clip during the holiday season, but that wasn't enough to offset investors' worries about whether its big bet on artificial intelligence will be lucrative as once envisioned.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5
